data.name: MILFs of Sunville - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
A young guy is forced to leave his luxurious life in a big city behind and return to a small town of Sunville, located near the ocean shore.
He dreams of going back and is mad at his father who ditched him for a young wife and left him without any financial support.
He must find a way and acquire the means to make his plan come true, but will he be able to do it?

A lot of temptations await him on his way.

The college he’s going to attend is full of sexy girls and teachers.
He needs to make a choice: follow his original goal or dive into a seductive world of love affairs. But nothing is ever easy — some relationships will demand changes from him.
He comes into town as a simple guy, will he be able to change? And what direction will those changes take? Will he become better or worse? There are a lot of different ways of achieving his goals.



You’re going to assume the role of that young man in a visual novel with excellent animations and quality graphics.
The game also has a slew of cool features. For example, you can take hidden photos with your phone’s camera.





Explore the world of MILFs of Sunville!

Dive deep into realistic relationships with people around you!

In total, MILFs of Sunville: Season 1 can boast more than 12.000 pictures, 270 animated clips and more than 25.000 lines of dialogue!




THE GAME FEATURES

  • More than 20 charming ladies and hot MILFs!
  • Lively characters with animated eyes
  • Flying camera inside animations with a variety of angles to choose
  • A fully-functional smartphone
  • An open world
  • 10-20 hours of gameplay
  • All of the graphics and music made without the use of AI

data.short_description: MILFs of Sunville is an adult game about a young guy forced to leave his luxurious life in a big city behind and return to a college in a small town of Sunville. This is a VN, filled with beautiful girls, romance, moral choices mixed with quality graphics and hot close-up animations.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 俄文, 法文, 烏克蘭文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文, 義大利文, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 波斯文, 捷克文, 阿拉伯文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 匈牙利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
